title: Collaboration Platform Session Analytics (Zoom/Teams Quality)
dataSources:
**Index:** `collab` (dedicated SaaS collaboration quality index partitioned by vendor `source`/`host`).
 **Sourcetypes:** **`zoom:meeting_quality`** — ingested via **Splunk Add-on for Zoom** modular inputs (Splunkbase) polling **Zoom Admin REST** endpoints such as **`/v2/metrics/meetings`**, **`/v2/metrics/quality`**, or Report API exports for participant-level **packet loss %, jitter (ms), latency / RTT (ms)**, **`meeting_id`**, **`user_email`**, geo-derived **`user_location`** / datacenter POP hints.
 **Mechanism:** OAuth app (Server-to-Server OAuth) stored in encrypted credential; scheduled REST poller on heavy forwarder **60–300s** cadence respecting Zoom **rate limit** headers (`429` exponential backoff). Alternative: **Zoom SIEM / webhook** streaming if licensed.
 **`teams:call_quality`** — **Microsoft Graph** **`/communications/callRecords`** (and expandable segments for session statistics) retrieved using **Splunk Add-on for Microsoft Cloud Services** (MSCS) OAuth client credentials (**Application permissions** `CallRecords.Read.All`). Polling cadence hourly batch typical due to eventual consistency of PSTN legs.
 **Key fields normalisation:** unify fractional vs percent packet loss (`if(packet_loss_pct<1, packet_loss_pct*100, packet_loss_pct)`); normalise jitter & latency naming (`averageJitter_ms` mappings); maintain meeting dedupe fingerprint `meeting_id` + `participant_id` surrogate.
 **Volume:** ~**1 aggregated row per participant-hour** trimmed environment ≈ tens of thousands / day enterprise; bursts Monday standups.
 **CIM:** Generally pre-CIM; optional future telemetry model mapping still rare.
app: **Splunk Add-on for Zoom** installed on **heavy forwarder + search head** (`$SPLUNK_HOME/etc/apps/Splunk_TA_zoom/` typical naming varies by Splunkbase package naming—verify local). Configure **Account** stanza referencing OAuth Client ID / Secret stored in Splunk credential store.**Splunk Add-on for Microsoft Cloud Services** (`splunk_ta_o365` family) enabling **Microsoft Graph input** referencing Azure AD tenant, client secret, delegated vs app-only permissions—Graph input host needs outbound **443 Microsoft** endpoints.**Splunk 9.x+.** Install versions matching Splunkbase compatibility matrix.**Locations:** Modular inputs execute on HF with API egress—not on UFs.
spl:
index=collab sourcetype IN ("zoom:meeting_quality","teams:call_quality")
| stats avg(packet_loss_pct) as avg_loss avg(jitter_ms) as avg_jitter avg(latency_ms) as avg_latency count as meetings by user_email user_location
| where avg_loss > 2 OR avg_jitter > 30 OR avg_latency > 200
| sort - avg_loss
description: Rolls meeting-quality telemetry—including average packet loss, jitter, and round-trip latency—by remote worker identity and inferred location tag to pinpoint chronic poor sessions rather than blame one-off outages.
value: Workplace productivity and employee experience sponsors can prioritize network remediation, ISP stipends, or office hoteling where collaboration tools consistently degrade, sustaining engagement for distributed recruiting and retention goals.
implementation: Land Zoom quality metrics dashboards through supported modular inputs polling Admin API aggregates. Combine Microsoft Teams call records via Splunk Add-on for Microsoft Cloud Services ensuring personal email aliases match HR directories. Sample daily baselines to avoid reacting to single meetings with bad Wi-Fi.
visualization: **Layout:** (1) **Panel A — “Latency vs Loss scatter”** — Scatter `avg_latency_ms` (x-axis) vs **`avg_loss` (%)** coloured by **`user_location`**. (2) **Panel B — “Chronic users table”** — Sortable **`user_email`**, **`user_location`**, meeting counts, KPI averages. (3) **Panel C — “Rolling quality trend”** — Timechart organisational average loss/jitter (no individual PII in executive printable PDF export variant). (4) **Panel D — “Meeting drilldown lens”** — Uses `meeting_id` token to show worst segment timeline for Desk tickets.
dataModelAcceleration: Not applicable: SaaS-derived collaboration metrics seldom map to classical network traffic models.

references.title: Zoom API Reference — Meetings and Dashboard metrics
Microsoft Learn — Microsoft Graph communications callRecords API overview
Microsoft Graph REST v1.0 — List callRecords

knownFalsePositives: (1) **Single commuter cellular hop-in calls** degrade metrics without chronic pattern. *Mitigation:* aggregate minimum **meetings≥5/week** macro before alerting on individuals. (2) **Parental-leave reramp hardware swap week** sporadic outliers. *Mitigation:* HR onboarding status lookup optional—not always ethical to integrate; prefer self-service anomaly acknowledgment flow. (3) **Audio-off / broadcast townhalls** show artificial low jitter while video missing—metrics misinterpret richness. *Mitigation:* correlate `audio_muted_ratio` telemetry if surfaced. (4) **Vendor regional CDN brownouts** across many unrelated users—not individual remediation. *Mitigation:* dimensional alert pivot `by user_email` suppressed when **`dc(user_email)>0.05*employee_base`** flagged external incident ticket open. (5) **Graph eventual consistency delaying call records ~15–180m** falsely appears as missing quality sample causing prior hour spike illusions cross joining. *Mitigation:* widen search `-4h@m` ingest alignment macro. (6) **Guest external participants skew averages** attaching low-quality unmanaged devices; filter `user_email MATCHES corporate domain pattern`.
detailedImplementation:
Prerequisites
• **Azure AD + Zoom Marketplace** OAuth apps reviewed by security architecture; scopes least privilege (**no admin user-delegated mail scopes** unnecessarily bundled).
• **Corporate email canonicalisation**: normalise casing & plus-address aliasing joins HR location feed **hashed dept only** respecting Works Council statutes.
• **Splunk HF credential storage** utilising **splunk.secret** protections + filesystem ACL—no plaintext Client Secret commits.
• **Rate-limit budget spreadsheet** aligning Zoom/Microsoft Graph quotas with poll frequency—re-negotiated quarterly.
• **Privacy DPIA**: continuous quality monitoring may constitute performance analytics—consult legal framing as **employee experience telemetry** proportional.
• **Splunk Enterprise / Splunk Cloud 9.2+**.

Step 1 — Configure data collection
**Zoom path:** Install TA; configure **Account** with Server-to-Server OAuth app creds; enable input **Meetings Quality Metrics** (names vary) writing `index=collab` `sourcetype=zoom:meeting_quality`. Map JSON fields: `packet_loss`, `avg_jitter`, `avg_latency`, `participant.user_email` → flatten at index time using `spath` or `INDEXED_EXTRACTIONS = json` if line JSON.
**Microsoft Teams path:** In MSCS add-on, create **Graph** input selecting **Call Records** resource; set interval **3600s** initial; authenticate using **certificate credential** preferred over rotating secret churn; route `sourcetype=teams:call_quality` alias via `props`.
**Normalisation macro (example):** add a **`macro_collab_packet_loss_pct`** that multiplies fractional values (<=1) by 100 once, so thresholds stay intuitive across vendors.
Verification: correlate single meeting **`meeting_id`** native Zoom dashboard vs Splunk `_raw` field parity snapshot screenshot archive monthly.

Step 2 — Create the search and alert
```spl
index=collab sourcetype IN ("zoom:meeting_quality","teams:call_quality")
| stats avg(packet_loss_pct) as avg_loss avg(jitter_ms) as avg_jitter avg(latency_ms) as avg_latency count as meetings by user_email user_location
| where avg_loss > 2 OR avg_jitter > 30 OR avg_latency > 200
| sort - avg_loss
```

Understanding this SPL
• **Cross-vendor union** assumes field aliasing pre-harmonised—if not, insert early `eval` coalescing blocks.
• **`stats` average triad** summarises user experience over entire search window—default risk: mixing short & long calls; optional weighting `sum(duration_sec)` denominator advanced extension omitted for clarity.
• **OR threshold pattern** flags any severe dimension—user may tune AND for stricter signal.
• **`sort - avg_loss`** emphasises audible impairments first (exec sensitivity).

Schedule as Alert: cron **`20 7 * * 1-5`** business-friendly review digest—not overnight paging; sliding window **`earliest=-7d@d` `latest=@d`** for chronic churn; severity **informational** routed to Employee Experience mailbox. — Validate
(a) Pick user; cross-check Microsoft **Call Quality Dashboard** (CQD) if licensed.
(b) Zoom **Dashboard** quality tab side-by-side.
(c) Confirm **internal domain filter** not dropping acquired subsidiary alternate domains—maintain `internal_domains.csv`.
(d) Validate Graph delay not producing empty windows.
(e) HR spot check `user_location` stale vs Workday address—refresh join weekly job.
(f) Accessibility: ensure dashboard colour-blind safe palette.

Step 4 — Operationalize
**Dashboard:** See `visualization` four panels; add **executive PDF** export without personal emails using aggregated site-level clone dashboard.
**Alerting:** Route to **ServiceNow Employee Tech Experience** RITM auto open optional low priority.
**Runbook:** 1) Ask user wired vs Wi-Fi test. 2) Verify VPN split video path policy. 3) Provide ISP speedtest SOP. 4) Facility check if clustered site-level heatmap anomaly. 5) Escalate network engineering if WAN loss correlates CQD BGP insights.

Step 5 — Troubleshooting
• **429 rate limit storms** → reduce polling concurrency & shard inputs across two HFs.
• **Stale OAuth token** unnoticed until silent failure—implement modular input health check alert `source=*Zoom* ERROR`.
• **Field null `user_email` for kiosk shared rooms**—exclude `room@sip` pattern via macro.
• **Misleading perfect metrics when calls disconnect before media** — filter out meetings with negligible duration via `meetings_duration_sec>30` guards.
• **If employees object under regional privacy regimes, pivot this UC to aggregated site-level dashboards only (no persistent per-user averages).
• **Splunk ingestion duplication double averages** fix dedup `event_id_primary` GUID vendor supplied.
• **Separate IPv6 traversal path skew** flagged by Networking—out of Splunk remediation advisory only.
grandmaExplanation: We track how glitchy everyone's video calls feel when folks work apart. Chronic choppy voices show where fixes—home internet help or office tweaks—keep teamwork kind and smooth instead of endlessly frustrating.
